description: Trigger suite for the artifact-linking skill.

cases.prompt: Link the issue, run, change, verification report, and handoff bundle so the trace is easy to follow.

link_set_present.check: Returns explicit artifact links or missing refs.

cases.prompt: Sync canonical state to GitHub labels and PR metadata.

routes_to_adjacent_workflow_when_needed.check: Routes to projection sync rather than pretending the task is only artifact linking.
